name: Jourdan Resources Inc.
description: Jourdan Resources Inc. is a Canadian junior mining exploration company focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties. The company primarily targets lithium, molybdenum, and diamond deposits, with a significant emphasis on its exploration activities within the province of Quebec, Canada. As an exploration-stage entity, Jourdan Resources operates with the objective of identifying and advancing high-potential mineral assets to contribute to the growing demand for critical battery metals and other industrial minerals.
